snippet: Built static-analysis gating that cut critical bugs 20% across a 20-engineer team.
note: The flip-flop failure that motivated this harness: the gate softened this real metric, then called the softened version a 'soft bluff'. A specific, mechanistically-supported metric is earned confidence — it must never draw a blocker.

snippet: I build the security layer for agentic systems.
note: Declarative, on-thesis voice — not marketing fluff. Must not be flagged as a blocker.

snippet: An agent reaches only the effects it was handed.
note: Real human catch ('Idk what effects means'): a non-expert reader stalls on 'effects'. The recruiter lens should at least notice the clarity problem.

snippet: A unified CRM and Square-API ETL that tracked P&L across 200+ events.
note: Real human catch ('Idk what P&L is'): an unexplained domain acronym on first use.

snippet: Shipped the frontend platform behind it, a design system and a dashboard framework.
note: Real human catch ('what is it?'): an ambiguous pronoun antecedent — a clarity problem.

snippet: Leveraged cross-functional synergies to drive impactful outcomes.
note: Resume cliche / AI-slop with no concrete content — the voice axis should catch it.

snippet: Single-handedly scaled the platform to 10M users.
note: An unsupported scale claim with no role or context — the kind of thing an interviewer exposes in one question. Claim-integrity blocker.
